/home/mants/miniconda3/envs/guard-cpp/bin/x86_64-conda-linux-gnu-c++ -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -fmessage-length=0 -march=nocona -mtune=haswell -ftree-vectorize -fPIC -fstack-protector-strong -fno-plt -O2 -ffunction-sections -pipe -isystem /home/mants/miniconda3/envs/guard-cpp/include -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-O2 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,-rpath,/home/mants/miniconda3/envs/guard-cpp/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/mants/miniconda3/envs/guard-cpp/lib -L/home/mants/miniconda3/envs/guard-cpp/lib -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/build_dataset.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/build_dataset.dir/build_dataset.cpp.o -o build_dataset  /home/mants/miniconda3/envs/guard-cpp/lib/libparquet.so.2300.1.0 /home/mants/miniconda3/envs/guard-cpp/lib/libcrypto.so /home/mants/miniconda3/envs/guard-cpp/lib/libarrow.so.2300.1.0 -ldl -lrt
